original_statement: how many different thread nominal sizes have at most 16 threads per inch (tpi)?
mutated_statement: how many different nominal sizes involve at most a certain number per unit?
mutation_analysis: Domain-specific term removal + Unit generalization + Quantifier vagueness + Term simplification: "thread"/domain removed; "thread nominal sizes" → "nominal sizes" | exact number "16" → vague "a certain number" | specific unit "per inch (tpi)" → generic "per unit" (how many different thread nominal sizes have at most 16 threads per inch (tpi)? → how many different nominal sizes involve at most a certain number per unit?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从agent的judge_thought可以识别出关键证据：其明确写道“Interpreting the threshold as 18 tpi… That makes 9 nominal sizes in total.”（iterations 中 initial_judge 的 chain 和 judge_thought 均以阈值18 tpi作为假定并给出具体答案9）。Agent直接将变异问题中的模糊阈值和单位映射到特定领域列（tpi）并选择了18作为阈值，未在任何位置表明问题不明确、未请求澄清或表达不确定性。该行为体现为直接假设并计算出具体结果，符合“没有意识到指令模糊、按自己的理解直接处理”的定义，因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
